document_id: 5.中华人民共和国能源法__中国政府网.html
category:
Category: Environmental

Explanation: This is China's Energy Law which focuses heavily on environmental and sustainable energy development, including provisions for renewable energy, clean energy transition, and carbon emissions reduction targets. The law aims to promote high-quality energy development while ensuring environmental protection.

extracted_info.title: Energy Law of the People's Republic of China
extracted_info.regulatory_body: Energy Department of the State Council
extracted_info.scope: Development, utilization, and management of all energy resources including fossil fuels, renewable energy, nuclear energy, and electricity
key_requirements: Establish minimum renewable energy consumption targets
Implement carbon emissions double control system
Ensure fair access to energy transmission networks
Install energy and carbon emission measurement devices

key_requirement_details.requirement: Energy companies and users must install and use energy and carbon emission measurement devices
key_requirement_details.compliance_action: Install and maintain measurement devices according to national regulations

key_requirement_details.requirement: Energy transmission network operators must provide fair and non-discriminatory access
key_requirement_details.compliance_action: Implement fair access mechanisms and publish network capacity information

reporting_requirements.description: Energy enterprises must provide accurate price cost and related data
Units must report relevant information to energy authorities

monetary_thresholds.description: Minimum fine for violations of service standards disclosure
Maximum fine for violations of service standards disclosure

penalties.type: Administrative fine for individuals during energy emergencies
Administrative fine for organizations during energy emergencies

enforcement_agencies: Energy Department of the State Council
Local Energy Authorities at County Level and Above
notes: Law focuses on transitioning to clean energy while maintaining energy security
Emphasizes development of renewable energy and non-fossil fuel sources
Establishes comprehensive energy market system and emergency response mechanisms
Promotes technological innovation in energy sector
